mapper.select:
/* ProdSaleMonthStoreBensonMapper.getProdSaleMonthStoreBensonList */
SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(tsmpsmv.SALE_YM, 'yyyymm'), 'yyyy-mm') AS SALE_YM , tsmpsmv.STORE_CD , tms.STORE_NM
, tmp.PROD_NM
, tmpcv.L_CLASS_NM
, SUM(tsmpsmv.TOT_SALE_QTY) AS SALE_QTY1 , SUM(tsmpsmv.TOT_SALE_AMT) AS TOT_SALE_AMT1 , SUM(tsmpsmv.REAL_SALE_AMT) AS REAL_SALE_AMT1
FROM TB_SL_MONTHLY_PROD_SDSEL_MOMS_V04 tsmpsmv , TB_MS_STORE tms , TB_MS_STORE_INFO tmsi , TB_MS_PRODUCT tmp
, TB_MS_PRODUCT_CLASS_V02 tmpcv
WHERE 1=1 AND tsmpsmv.HQ_OFFICE_CD = #{hqOfficeCd} AND tsmpsmv.SALE_YM BETWEEN #{startMonth} AND #{endMonth}
AND tsmpsmv.STORE_CD IN (${storeCdQuery})
AND tms.HQ_BRAND_CD = #{storeHqBrandCd} -- 매장브랜드 선택일때
-- 매장브랜드 전체일때 AND tms.HQ_BRAND_CD IN
#{item}
AND tmp.PROD_CLASS_CD IN
#{item}
AND tmp.PROD_CD LIKE '%'||#{prodCd}||'%'
AND tmp.PROD_NM LIKE '%'||#{prodNm}||'%'
AND tsmpsmv.PROD_CD IN (${prodCdQuery})
AND tmp.HQ_BRAND_CD = #{prodHqBrandCd} -- 상품브랜드 선택일때
-- 상품브랜드 전체일때 AND tmp.HQ_BRAND_CD IN
#{item}
AND tms.STORE_CD = tsmpsmv.STORE_CD AND tmsi.STORE_CD (+) = tms.STORE_CD AND tmp.STORE_CD = tsmpsmv.STORE_CD AND tmp.PROD_CD = tsmpsmv.PROD_CD
AND tmp.STORE_CD = tmpcv.STORE_CD AND tmp.PROD_CD = tmpcv.PROD_CD AND tmp.PROD_CLASS_CD = tmpcv.PROD_CLASS_CD
GROUP BY tsmpsmv.SALE_YM , tsmpsmv.STORE_CD , tms.STORE_NM
, tsmpsmv.PROD_CD , tmp.PROD_NM
, tmpcv.L_CLASS_CD , tmpcv.L_CLASS_NM
ORDER BY tsmpsmv.SALE_YM , tsmpsmv.STORE_CD
, tsmpsmv.PROD_CD
, tmpcv.L_CLASS_CD

/* ProdSaleMonthStoreBensonMapper.getProdSaleMonthStoreBensonExcelList */ SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(tsmpsmv.SALE_YM, 'yyyymm'), 'yyyy-mm') AS SALE_YM , tsmpsmv.STORE_CD , tms.STORE_NM
, tmp.PROD_NM
, tmpcv.L_CLASS_NM
, SUM(tsmpsmv.TOT_SALE_QTY) AS SALE_QTY1 , SUM(tsmpsmv.TOT_SALE_AMT) AS TOT_SALE_AMT1 , SUM(tsmpsmv.REAL_SALE_AMT) AS REAL_SALE_AMT1 FROM TB_SL_MONTHLY_PROD_SDSEL_MOMS_V04 tsmpsmv , TB_MS_STORE tms , TB_MS_STORE_INFO tmsi , TB_MS_PRODUCT tmp
, TB_MS_PRODUCT_CLASS_V02 tmpcv
WHERE 1=1 AND tsmpsmv.HQ_OFFICE_CD = #{hqOfficeCd} AND tsmpsmv.SALE_YM BETWEEN #{startMonth} AND #{endMonth}
AND tsmpsmv.STORE_CD IN (${storeCdQuery})
AND tms.HQ_BRAND_CD = #{storeHqBrandCd} -- 매장브랜드 선택일때
-- 매장브랜드 전체일때 AND tms.HQ_BRAND_CD IN
#{item}
AND tmp.PROD_CLASS_CD IN
#{item}
AND tmp.PROD_CD LIKE '%'||#{prodCd}||'%'
AND tmp.PROD_NM LIKE '%'||#{prodNm}||'%'
AND tsmpsmv.PROD_CD IN (${prodCdQuery})
AND tmp.HQ_BRAND_CD = #{prodHqBrandCd} -- 상품브랜드 선택일때
-- 상품브랜드 전체일때 AND tmp.HQ_BRAND_CD IN
#{item}
AND tms.STORE_CD = tsmpsmv.STORE_CD AND tmsi.STORE_CD (+) = tms.STORE_CD AND tmp.STORE_CD = tsmpsmv.STORE_CD AND tmp.PROD_CD = tsmpsmv.PROD_CD
AND tmp.STORE_CD = tmpcv.STORE_CD AND tmp.PROD_CD = tmpcv.PROD_CD AND tmp.PROD_CLASS_CD = tmpcv.PROD_CLASS_CD
GROUP BY tsmpsmv.SALE_YM , tsmpsmv.STORE_CD , tms.STORE_NM
, tsmpsmv.PROD_CD , tmp.PROD_NM
, tmpcv.L_CLASS_CD , tmpcv.L_CLASS_NM
ORDER BY tsmpsmv.SALE_YM , tsmpsmv.STORE_CD
, tsmpsmv.PROD_CD
, tmpcv.L_CLASS_CD

/* ProdSaleMonthStoreBensonMapper.getProdSaleMonthStoreBensonExcelDivisionList */
SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(tsmpsmv.SALE_YM, 'yyyymm'), 'yyyy-mm') AS SALE_YM , tsmpsmv.STORE_CD , tms.STORE_NM
, tmp.PROD_NM
, tmpcv.L_CLASS_NM
, SUM(tsmpsmv.TOT_SALE_QTY) AS SALE_QTY1 , SUM(tsmpsmv.TOT_SALE_AMT) AS TOT_SALE_AMT1 , SUM(tsmpsmv.REAL_SALE_AMT) AS REAL_SALE_AMT1 FROM TB_SL_MONTHLY_PROD_SDSEL_MOMS_V04 tsmpsmv , TB_MS_STORE tms , TB_MS_STORE_INFO tmsi , TB_MS_PRODUCT tmp
, TB_MS_PRODUCT_CLASS_V02 tmpcv
WHERE 1=1 AND tsmpsmv.HQ_OFFICE_CD = #{hqOfficeCd} AND tsmpsmv.SALE_YM BETWEEN #{startMonth} AND #{endMonth}
AND tsmpsmv.STORE_CD IN (${storeCdQuery})
AND tms.HQ_BRAND_CD = #{storeHqBrandCd} -- 매장브랜드 선택일때
-- 매장브랜드 전체일때 AND tms.HQ_BRAND_CD IN
#{item}
AND tmp.PROD_CLASS_CD IN
#{item}
AND tmp.PROD_CD LIKE '%'||#{prodCd}||'%'
AND tmp.PROD_NM LIKE '%'||#{prodNm}||'%'
AND tsmpsmv.PROD_CD IN (${prodCdQuery})
AND tmp.HQ_BRAND_CD = #{prodHqBrandCd} -- 상품브랜드 선택일때
-- 상품브랜드 전체일때 AND tmp.HQ_BRAND_CD IN
#{item}
AND tms.STORE_CD = tsmpsmv.STORE_CD AND tmsi.STORE_CD (+) = tms.STORE_CD AND tmp.STORE_CD = tsmpsmv.STORE_CD AND tmp.PROD_CD = tsmpsmv.PROD_CD
AND tmp.STORE_CD = tmpcv.STORE_CD AND tmp.PROD_CD = tmpcv.PROD_CD AND tmp.PROD_CLASS_CD = tmpcv.PROD_CLASS_CD
GROUP BY tsmpsmv.SALE_YM , tsmpsmv.STORE_CD , tms.STORE_NM
, tsmpsmv.PROD_CD , tmp.PROD_NM
, tmpcv.L_CLASS_CD , tmpcv.L_CLASS_NM
ORDER BY tsmpsmv.SALE_YM , tsmpsmv.STORE_CD
, tsmpsmv.PROD_CD
, tmpcv.L_CLASS_CD
